item.name: Authentic Eggcentric Chocolate Cake
item.description:
A staggeringly sweet chocolate cake served with chocolate bunnies and what one can only hope are chocolate eggs, rather than authentic ones that might have been farm-fresh as of last year.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Critical Hit Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
